title: Caterserve 40 Loaf Tin Liners | Fits 2lb Loaf Tins for Baking | Non-Stick Bread Tins | Baking Paper Compatible with Conventional Ovens,Air Fryer, Microwaves, | Ideal for Home Use, Catering
features: THE PERFECT CHOICE: Whether a professional baker or you simply enjoy surprising your family and friends with delicious home-baked bread, the CaterServe loaf tin liners are guaranteed to provide perfect results every time!

PREMIUM QUALITY PAPER: These loaf tins for baking are made with superior quality, food-grade baking paper, heat resistant up to 230°C. This paper is compatible with conventional ovens and microwave, being 100% freezer safe.
NON-STICK EXPERIENCE: Say goodbye to frustrating baking experiences, wasted ingredients, time and energy with these bread tins for baking which are entirely non-stick and convenient!
PERFECTLY SIZED: Each 2lb loaf tin measures 19 x 9 x 6.4cm and fits a 2lb loaf bread or cake. The easy to remove design will save you the hassle of scraping, providing an even baling experience!

MULTIPURPOSE & VERSATILE: Use this 40pcs set of cake tin liners in the comfort of your own home, for your catering business, restaurant, hotel or delivery service, bake delicious cakes or loaf breads and impress your customers or loved ones!
description: When it comes to our customer’s satisfaction, there’s no room for compromise. That’s why we have chosen to work only with top quality materials and verified suppliers, which are guaranteed to deliver to our high expectations. If by some reason you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, our customer care department has got you covered! Why is this product for you? The CaterServe Loaf Tin Liners are definitely a must in every modern kitchen, being a practical and effective way of ensuring non-sticky, perfectly smooth baking results! Made with premium quality baking paper, with an easy to remove design and wide oven compatibility, these loaf tins for baking minimize product waste, saving your money, time and energy! Some of the amazing features of this product: Set includes 40pcs cake tin liners; Dimensions: 19 x 9 x 6.4cm; Food-grade 100% safe material; For optimal results, we recommend buttering the liners before use; Compatible with conventional ovens, microwave, freezer-safe; Ideal for bread, cakes; Practical and easy to use; Heat resistant and oven safe up to 230°C. Make sure to surprise your loved ones with delicious bread or cake each time, by using these premium 2lb loaf tins!
